I currently have 5K miles on the bike. All 5K miles I have had stalling issues. These issues mostly happen when lightly feathering the throttle while pulling out. This issue is not in my clutch work. It seems to be in the throttle sensor. The bike has began to randomly shut down

narrative.headline: What 2025 Indian Scout owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 3 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Electrical System (67% of reports).
